boundary_terms.source: PreSanitizeTap.pre_boundary plus PreSanitizeTap.boundary_tendency from coupling.driver scan side-channel
boundary_terms.water_closure_source: Per-step total vapor+hydrometeor column delta on the PRE-sanitize pair; the current Thompson adapter does not expose an independent precipitation-tendency side channel.

sanitize_policy.measured_state: candidate State after boundary replay and before sanitize_state(candidate, previous)
